name: @firstpick/pi-skill-network-diagnostics
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for connectivity, DNS, Pi-hole, port reachability, routing, firewall reachability, TLS/network timeouts, or service access failures. Provides structured network troubleshooting commands and interpretation.
description_zh: 代理应在连接性、DNS、Pi-hole、端口可达性、路由、防火墙可达性、TLS/网络超时或服务访问故障时调用此技能。提供结构化网络故障排除命令和解释
